baseline_guidance: Run each eval with this skill and compare against a no-skill baseline or the previous skill version; pass only when the skilled run better satisfies the assertions without losing required safety or precision.

evals.prompt: Pick up an unassigned GitHub issue and drive it through implementation, checks, PR, review, and approval using a local Git worktree.
evals.expected_output: Claims an eligible issue, creates or reuses a local Git worktree, isolates or records local resource conflicts, maintains local run state, implements and verifies the fix, opens a PR, responds to review, and stops only at approval or a clear blocker.
assertions: Stops when the issue is already assigned, unclear, closed, or blocked.
Uses default Git worktree commands and records worktree/branch/PR state.
Checks fixed ports, Docker Compose project names, database names, caches, generated files, and local services before treating streams as parallel-safe.
Records non-isolatable local resources as throughput blockers.
Runs required local gates or records why CI must substitute.
Creates or updates the PR body with full context: linked issue, related issues/PRs, dependencies, stacked/base or downstream PRs, validation, skipped checks, risks, and merge notes.
Does not force-delete or reset dirty work without explicit approval.
